subject: [PATCH RFC v2 00/18] mm/virtio: skip redundant zeroing of host-zeroed reported pages

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified lifecycle problems with leaking page information, suggested that plugging __GFP_ZERO correctly is the only feasible approach to avoid staleness issues.

reviews.author: Michael S. Tsirkin
reviews.summary: Agreed with Gregory's assessment and suggested a new version of the patch (v3) that addresses the concerns.

2026-04-21.patch_summary: Proposal to skip redundant zeroing of host-zeroed reported pages in virtio mm code, with discussion around the feasibility and potential issues of leaking page information.
